creator: Cindy Zackney
title: (No AI) Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
dc:creator: Cindy Zackney
content: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.

creator: Lauren Forristal
title: (No AI) Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy

title: (No AI) How Project Maven taught the military to love AI
author: Joshua Dzieza
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/268484_How_the_US_embraced_AI_warfare_CVirginia.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

In the first 24 hours of the assault on Iran, the US military struck more than 1,000 targets, nearly double the scale of the "shock and awe" attack on Iraq over two decades ago. This acceleration was made possible by AI systems that speed up the targeting process. Chief among them is the Maven Smart System.

In her new book, [_Project Maven: A Marine Colonel, His Team, and the Dawn of AI Warfare_](https://wwnorton.com/books/project-maven), journalist Katrina Manson investigates the development of Maven from its inception in 2017 as an experiment in applying computer vision to drone footage. The project spurred employee [protests at Google](https://www.theverge.com/2018/4/4/17199818/google-pentagon-project-maven-pull-out-letter-ceo-sundar-pichai), the military's initial contractor, prompting the …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/917996/project-maven-military-ai-katrina-manson)

title: (No AI) AirPods, Touch Bars, and the rest of Tim Cook’s legacy
author: David Pierce
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/VRG_VST_0424_Site.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

We knew at some point Tim Cook would step down from his position as Apple's CEO. Over the last year, it has become increasingly obvious that John Ternus was his likely successor. The news this week was still a surprise, though - and this year's succession could lead to [some important changes](https://www.theverge.com/tech/916585/tim-cook-apple-new-era) at the most influential company in tech.

![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/11/Vergecast-Tile-Large.jpeg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

_Verge_ subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free _Vergecast_ wherever you get your podcasts. Head [here](https://www.theverge.com/account/podcasts). Not a subscriber? You can [sign up here](https://www.theverge.com/subscribe).

On [this episode of _The Vergecast_](https://pod.link/vergecast), David and Nilay are joined by _[Daring Fireball](https://daringfireball.net/)_'s John Gruber to talk about their reactions to the news, the ([mostly](https://www.theverge.com/tech/916228/tim-cook-i-am-healthy-my-energy-is-high-and-i-plan-to-be-in-this-new-role-for-a-long-time) …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/podcast/917965/apple-ceo-cook-ternus-transition)

creator: Marta Musso
title: (No AI) Ace the Ping-Pong Robot Can Whup Your Ass
dc:creator: Marta Musso
